'''Womwa''' was an [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who left his [[Ithor/Legends|homeworld]] and settled on a remote [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. He liked the planet so much, he decided to remain, and opened a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] known as [[The Haven]]. The cantina was a front, however, for Womwa's lucrative [[Spice/Legends|spice]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] operations.
